name: Owens Corning
description: Owens Corning is a global leader in building and construction materials, specializing in the development and production of insulation, roofing, and fiberglass composites. Headquartered in the United States, the company is recognized as the world's largest manufacturer of fiberglass composites. With a commitment to material innovation and sustainability, Owens Corning provides a wide range of high-performance solutions for residential and commercial building needs, including shingles, asphalt, and acoustic systems, helping to improve energy efficiency and durability in structures across the globe.
